messages.content: You're experiencing a VPN issue. Can you please provide more details about the problem you're facing, such as a connection failure, slow speed, or frequent disconnections? This will help me provide a more specific solution based on our IT documentation.

messages.content:
To reset your VPN password, you should follow the password reset procedure outlined in the password_policy.txt document. Since your VPN password is the same as your network password (AD login), you can reset it by:

1. Going to https://account.microsoft.com/security
2. Clicking "Change password"
3. Entering your current password
4. Creating a new strong password (minimum 12 characters)
5. Including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols
6. Clicking "Save"

Then, use this new password to connect to the VPN. If you've forgotten your password, follow the "Forgot Your Password?" steps in the password_policy.txt document. If you're still having issues, contact IT support.
